keyFactors: Both teams have not played against each other before, making historical analysis difficult.
Egypt's recent defensive form is strong with a low goals against average and high clean sheet rate.
Iran has a potent offense with a high goals for average.
The match is played at a neutral venue, eliminating home advantage.
Both teams have not played in approximately the same period (61 days), so they are equally rested.
risks: The impact of Iran's previous suspension on team morale and dynamics.
Unpredictability due to the lack of head-to-head historical data.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Egypt mit hoher gewichteter Form (2.13) und sehr starker Defensive (Gegentore 0.41/Spiel, Clean-Sheet-Rate 57%); Iran offensivstark (2.27 Tore/Spiel), aber defensiv anfälliger (0.91 Gegentore, 46% Clean Sheets); Elo-Vorteil leicht bei Egypt (1770 vs 1730), neutraler Spielort hebt Heimvorteil auf.
